description_long: This is a modern, angular faucet with a sleek, geometric design, finished in a glossy black color. The faucet features a single, flat lever handle positioned above a rectangular spout, both of which are sharply contoured and integrated into a solid, squared base. The spout extends horizontally from the main body, providing a streamlined appearance, while the handle sits slightly elevated and parallel to the spout. The overall construction suggests a robust metal build, likely brass or stainless steel with a dark, polished coating. The faucet is designed for deck-mount installation, commonly found in urban bathrooms, kitchens, or public washrooms. Its minimalist aesthetic and reflective surface make it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A sleek, glossy black faucet with a single lever handle and a rectangular spout, featuring sharp, modern lines and a solid, squared base. Its minimalist design and polished finish make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rectangular spout opening and the flat, wide handle aligned above the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal extension of the spout and the elevated single lever handle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the squared, solid base and the narrow profile of the spout and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the spout and handle arrangement, emphasizing the faucet's angular geometry.
